summary: Iteration 26 (Iteration A) — CMS + Admin Invite + ReDoS fix + password toggle. 37/37 backend pytest cases pass; all critical frontend flows verified.

issues: React console warning: 'Cannot update a component (BrowserRouter) while rendering a different component (AdminLogin)'. Non-blocking but indicates a setState being called during render — likely a navigate() or setState invoked in the function body. Recommend wrapping in useEffect.

action_items: (Low priority) Fix React setState-in-render warning on AdminLogin — wrap any auto-nav/redirect side-effect in useEffect.
(Optional) Consider exposing data-testid='admin-login-email' / 'admin-login-submit' / 'admin-2fa-code' / 'admin-2fa-submit' if not already done (testing assumed presence and they worked).
critical_code_review_comments: ReDoS fix is correctly applied: /admin/search now re.escapes the query before passing to Mongo $regex. Verified: q='.*' and q='(a+)+b' both return 200 in <2s and q='hello@techglove' still finds the matching user.

Admin invite flow correctly: (a) supersedes prior pending invites, (b) flips to 'accepted' on success, (c) rejects re-acceptance with 400, (d) returns 404 on revoking non-pending, (e) returns 409 if email already an admin, (f) freshly-created admin can log in with new password and is offered 2FA setup (requires_2fa_setup:true).

CMS endpoints: slugs are lowercased server-side; slug validation, duplicate-slug 409, public 404-on-draft, publish-then-public-200 all working. Glossary bulk-import idempotent (added=2 / skipped=1 verified).

Magic-link accept page handles all 3 states correctly: invalid → 'Invite unavailable' (accept-invite-error), success → accept-invite-done w/ accept-invite-signin, second visit → accept-invite-stale ('This invite is no longer valid').
test_credentials: hello@techglove.com.au / AdminPass!2026 (TOTP CYB5PKTKR4F2JM4ACWIFTY2C67RUVUTI). Test invite acceptee: smoke-ui-1778507224@example.com / NewAdminPass1!
seed_data_creation: All test data prefixed TEST_ (glossary terms) or test- (article/template/changelog slugs); auto-cleaned in pytest session fixture. smoke-test-e2e@* and smoke-ui-* user/invite docs also auto-cleaned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file is /app/backend/tests/test_iter26_cms_invite.py (37 cases, runs in ~9s). Note: ArticleBody and TemplateBody server-side lowercase the slug, so pass slugs in lowercase (e.g. 'test-aged-care-os') when creating. Accept-invite confirm field testid is 'accept-confirm' (NOT 'accept-password-confirm' as review brief loosely stated).
